title: vcd trace splits packed data type when it comes through a typedef

features.name: typedef alias of 1-bit scalar type used in struct
features.description: Code should include a typedef creating an alias for a 1-bit type (logic, bit, reg) which is then used in a struct field definition
features.snippet:
typedef logic foo;
typedef struct { foo field; } bar;

features.name: packed array field in struct using typedef of scalar
features.description: Code should include a struct with a packed array field where the element type is a typedef of a 1-bit type (logic/bit/reg), creating a multi-bit field
features.snippet:
typedef logic foo;
typedef struct { foo [7:0] field; } bar;
